text.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuning Data Preparation — Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing `fine-tuning-openai-data-prep` applied to a real-shape scenario.

section.title: Worked example: support-tone CSV -> JSONL
section.p: Source: 4200-row CSV of customer-support tickets with columns (ticket_id, customer_message, agent_reply, tone_label).

list.item: extract: 4200 rows, dropped 18 with empty customer_message → 4182.
schema-map: chat format. system='You are a support agent. Adopt the requested tone.', user=customer_message, assistant=agent_reply.
validate: 4182 lines, 0 schema errors, 0 PII matches after scrub, max tokens/example=1820 (within gpt-4o-mini 16k limit).
split: hash-disjoint 80/20 → 3346 train, 836 val. Class balance: apologetic 1112, neutral 1380, assertive 854 — ratio 1.6x → downsample neutral to 1280.
